headline: Old Dominion Freight Line (ODFL) Shares Skyrocket, What You Need To Know
summary: Shares of freight carrier Old Dominion (NASDAQ:ODFL) jumped 5.3% in the afternoon session after analysts from both Stifel and Goldman Sachs raised their price targets on the company's shares.
